title: Surgeon Vacancy at Sun Pharmaceutical - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Sun Pharmaceutical - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Sun Pharmaceutical has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Bhubaneswar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Sun Pharmaceutical:
Sun Pharmaceutical is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sun Pharmaceutical!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
